settings.title: Settings

meta.title: Accept package bookings - Practitioner
meta.description: Enable or disable package booking acceptance.

packageAvailability.title: Session packages
packageAvailability.description: Enable this option if you want to receive package bookings from patients.
packageAvailability.helper: When this option is off, patients cannot buy new packages with you, and existing packages or sessions will not be affected.

warning.title: You cannot enable packages right now

feedback.error: Could not save package settings right now. Please try again.
feedback.loadError: Could not load package settings. Please try again.
feedback.missingRequirements: You cannot enable packages before completing the required requirements.

packageAvailability.title: Session packages

packageAvailability.helper: When this option is off, patients cannot buy new packages with you, and existing packages or sessions will not be affected.

feedback.error: Could not save package settings right now. Please try again.

meta.title: Dashboard — Practitioner
meta.description: Your practitioner overview, application status, and quick navigation.

page.title: Dashboard
page.subtitle: See what needs your attention now and keep your workspace ready.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your professional information and bio.

specialties.title: Specialties
specialties.description: Manage the specialties linked to your profile.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Upload credential references and track their review status.

application.title: Application
application.description: Check your application status and submit when ready.

requests.heading: Pending requests
requests.emptyNote: No pending instant booking requests right now.

sessions.heading: Upcoming sessions
sessions.emptyNote: Confirmed and upcoming sessions with patients will appear here.

notes.CONFIRMED: Scheduled and waiting for the join window to open.
notes.UPCOMING: Coming up soon. Review the session details if needed.
notes.READY_TO_JOIN: You can open the session room now.
notes.IN_PROGRESS: This session is already in progress.
notes.PENDING_PAYMENT: The session is waiting for patient payment.
notes.PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE: This session still needs your response.

links.heading: Quick access
links.primaryNote: These are the routes you are most likely to use during live work.
links.walletNote: Review your current balance and top-level finance summary.
links.ledgerNote: Inspect recent financial entries without leaving the practitioner area.
links.settlementsNote: Check settlement batches and their current visibility states.
links.careChatNote: Review approved and pending care-chat requests without switching to a general chat flow.
links.profileNote: Keep your profile accurate and patient-ready.
links.applicationNote: Track your approval state and readiness.
links.credentialsNote: Add credential references here and track whether they are pending, approved, rejected, or expired.
links.specialtiesNote: Manage the specialties linked to your profile and keep one marked as primary.

pendingRequests.heading: {count, plural, one {# booking request is waiting} other {# booking requests are waiting}}
pendingRequests.note: Respond quickly so patients do not lose their booking window.

readySessions.heading: {count, plural, one {# session can be opened now} other {# sessions can be opened now}}
readySessions.note: Joinable sessions should stay within easy reach while they are live.

pendingResponses.heading: {count, plural, one {# session still needs your response} other {# sessions still need your response}}
pendingResponses.note: Check the session details to confirm what should happen next.

clear.heading: No urgent runtime action right now
clear.note: Your immediate queue looks clear. Keep your availability and presence ready for new work.

readiness.heading: Runtime readiness
readiness.onlineInstant: You are online and open for instant booking right now.
readiness.online: You are online. Review instant booking if you want patients to book you immediately.
readiness.away: You are marked away, so check your status before upcoming work starts.
readiness.busy: You are marked busy. Switch back when you are ready to take live work.
readiness.offline: You are currently offline. Update your presence before opening instant availability.

feedback.success: Your profile change request was submitted successfully.

request.primarySpecialtyRequired: Select a primary specialty before submitting the request.
request.payoutAccountHolderRequired: Account holder name is required before submitting.
request.notice: Sensitive profile changes are not applied live until admin approves them.
request.modalDescription: Prepare the details below and send them for admin review before they go live.
request.noRequest: No review request has been submitted yet.
request.noChanges: No changes detected in this request.

statusMessage.SUBMITTED: The request has been submitted and is waiting for review.
statusMessage.APPROVED: The request was approved and is live.
statusMessage.UNDER_REVIEW: The request is currently under review.
statusMessage.DRAFT: This request is still a draft.

request.noRequestHint: Use the request flow to propose profile changes for admin approval.

instantBooking.pricingNote: Enter the prices that will be used when instant booking is enabled.

feedback.removeError: Could not prepare the avatar removal request right now.
feedback.updateError: Could not prepare the avatar change request right now.

avatar.livePresent: A live avatar is already available on your profile.
avatar.note: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Large images are compressed before submission.
avatar.title: Avatar review
avatar.removeSelected: Selected avatar will be removed in this request.
avatar.liveEmpty: No live avatar is currently set.
avatar.pageHint: Preview a new avatar here. It is not included in this submission yet.
avatar.hintBody: Use this area to preview an avatar replacement or removal locally. Profile changes are submitted separately.

validation.invalidType: Only JPG, PNG, and WEBP images are supported.

validation.countryCodeMax: Country code must be 3 characters or less
validation.payoutAccountHolderNameMax: Account holder name must be 191 characters or less
validation.bioMax: Bio must be 4000 characters or less
validation.timezoneMax: Timezone must be 80 characters or less
validation.payoutDestinationRequired: Complete the payout details before submitting.
validation.payoutWalletProviderMax: Wallet provider must be 191 characters or less
validation.payoutBankAccountNumberMax: Bank account number must be 191 characters or less
validation.payoutOtherDetailsMax: Payout details must be 1000 characters or less
validation.professionalTitleMax: Professional title must be 191 characters or less
validation.yearsMin: Years of experience cannot be negative
validation.yearsMax: Years of experience seems too high
validation.payoutIbanMax: IBAN must be 191 characters or less
validation.displayNameMax: Display name must be 80 characters or less
validation.payoutWalletIdentifierMax: Wallet number must be 191 characters or less
validation.payoutBankNameMax: Bank name must be 191 characters or less
validation.sessionPriceInvalid: Enter a valid price greater than zero.
validation.instantBookingPriceInvalid: Enter a valid instant booking price greater than zero.

sections.payoutDestinationNote: Choose the payout destination that receives your earnings.
sections.liveProfileNote: This is the approved profile currently visible to patients.
sections.changeRequestNote: Draft your updates here and send them for admin review before they become live.
sections.sessionPricingNote: Enter the regular prices patients will use for standard booking.

readiness.readyNote: Your current live profile looks ready to keep as-is.
readiness.notReadyNote: You have draft changes or missing details that still need admin review.

payoutWalletProvider.countryPrompt: Choose a payout country first to see available wallet providers.
payoutWalletProvider.emptyState: No options are available for this country yet. Contact the admin team to add the bank or wallet provider.

payoutCountryCode.hint: This country filters the available banks and wallet providers.

payoutBankName.label: Bank name
payoutBankName.countryPrompt: Choose a payout country first to see available banks.
payoutBankName.emptyState: No options are available for this country yet. Contact the admin team to add the bank or wallet provider.

onboarding.otpRequiredNote: We cannot open the practitioner workspace before your account OTP is verified. Once verification is complete, the full practitioner dashboard will be available.

meta.title: Credentials — Practitioner
meta.description: View and manage your uploaded credentials.

page.title: Credentials
page.subtitle: Add credential references and track their current review state.

credentials.empty: Add your first credential reference so your professional record is easier to review.

management.heading: Credential references on your practitioner account
management.note: Use this screen to add credential metadata that is already stored through your active file workflow.
management.scopeNote: This surface supports adding new credential references and tracking review status. It does not manage file storage, replacement, or removal.

summary.heading: Credential summary
summary.readyNote: You already have credential records on file. Keep them current if your professional details change.
summary.missingNote: Your application readiness still needs at least one credential record.

form.heading: Add a credential reference
form.fileUrlHint: Enter the direct file URL or resolved storage reference used by your current file workflow.
form.scopeNote: Adding a new reference creates another credential record for review.
form.duplicateNote: The same credential type cannot be added twice with the same file reference.

validation.fileUrlRequired: Enter the file URL or storage reference before uploading.

feedback.loadError: Could not load credentials. Please try again.
feedback.loadErrorNote: Your credential records could not be loaded right now.
feedback.uploadSuccess: Your credential reference was added successfully.
feedback.uploadError: Could not upload your credential reference. Please try again.
feedback.duplicateError: This credential type already has the same file reference on your account.

meta.title: Specialties — Practitioner
meta.description: View and manage your linked specialties.

page.title: Specialties
page.subtitle: Review, update, and keep your linked specialties accurate.

specialties.empty: Choose at least one specialty to keep your practitioner profile ready.

management.heading: Profile specialties
management.note: Here you can choose the specialties you practice to showcase in your profile and help clients find you.
management.replaceHint: Please keep one specialty marked as primary to define your profile's main focus.

catalog.heading: Add another specialty
catalog.categoryEmptyNote: Try another category to add a sub-specialty.
catalog.selectionNote: You can add only specialties that are currently active on Sawiyaa.
catalog.primaryNote: One specialty always stays primary. If you remove the current primary, the first remaining specialty becomes primary.
catalog.noAvailableToAdd: All available specialties are already selected.
catalog.emptyTitle: No specialties are available right now
catalog.emptyNote: There are no active specialties to add at the moment.
catalog.loadErrorNote: Your current specialties are visible, but editing needs the active specialties list to load first.

validation.minOne: Choose at least one specialty before saving.

feedback.loadError: Could not load specialties. Please try again.
feedback.loadErrorNote: The specialties linked to your profile could not be loaded right now.
feedback.saveError: Could not save your specialties. Please try again.

meta.title: Availability — Practitioner
meta.description: Manage your weekly schedule and instant booking settings.

page.title: Availability
page.subtitle: Set your weekly schedule, manage exceptions, and control your presence.

feedback.loadError: Could not load your availability. Please try again.

presence.heading: Online presence
presence.description: Control your current status and instant booking availability.

instantBooking.label: Instant booking
instantBooking.description: Allow patients to book immediately without manual confirmation.
instantBooking.enabled: Patients can book you instantly right now.

presence.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

feedback.loadError: Could not load presence data. Please try again.

schedule.heading: Weekly schedule
schedule.description: Choose a day, then set 30-minute and 60-minute slots independently.
schedule.recurrenceNote: This is a recurring weekly schedule. It will be used for future weeks unless you edit it or add an exception for a specific day.
schedule.noTimezone: No timezone is set on your profile. Please update your timezone in Profile before setting your schedule.
schedule.saveHint: Saving will replace your entire weekly schedule.
schedule.saveError: Could not save schedule. Please try again.

validation.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
validation.overlap: This slot overlaps with an existing one.

schedule.daySelectorHint: Pick the day you want to edit. You can clear only that day, then work on each duration separately.
schedule.timeGridHint: Tap a start time to add or remove a slot. The grid switches to hourly blocks in 60-minute mode.
schedule.selectedRangesHint: Review the selected day separately for 30-minute and 60-minute slots.
schedule.emptySelectedDay: No time has been selected for this day yet.

stats.currentDayHint: The day you are editing now
stats.dayBlocksHint: {count, plural, one {# selected range} other {# selected ranges}}
stats.weekBlocksHint: {count, plural, one {# saved range} other {# saved ranges}}
stats.saved: Your current draft matches the saved schedule.

schedule.durationHint: Choose whether the time block will represent a 30-minute or 60-minute session.
schedule.durationNote: New slots will use {duration}. The 30-minute and 60-minute schedules are independent.
schedule.independenceNote: Select one duration at a time, or switch between them whenever you need to edit a different schedule.

exceptions.heading: Edit a specific day
exceptions.description: Choose a date to adjust your availability without changing your weekly schedule.
exceptions.dayNote: Specific-day adjustments apply only to this date and do not change your recurring weekly schedule.

dateMode.title: Edit a specific day
dateMode.subtitle: Choose a date to adjust your availability without changing your weekly schedule.

exceptions.deleteError: Could not delete the exception. Please try again.
exceptions.createError: Could not create the exception. Please try again.

errors.create: Could not create the exception. Please try again.
errors.delete: Could not delete the exception. Please try again.

labels.blockTime: Prevent bookings during a specific time
labels.dayOff: Prevent bookings for the full day

blockTimes.title: Prevent bookings during specific times
blockTimes.description: Choose times inside this day to stop bookings there.
blockTimes.helper: Choose the range start and end, then save the booking-blocked times.

dayOff.title: Prevent bookings for the full day
dayOff.description: Make this day unavailable for bookings.
dayOff.helper: This prevents bookings for this day only. You can add an optional internal note.
dayOff.noteTitle: Prevent bookings for the full day
dayOff.note: This action prevents bookings for this date only.

extraAvailability.title: Add extra times
extraAvailability.description: Add bookable time outside your usual weekly schedule.
extraAvailability.helper: Choose the time range you want to open for bookings on this date.

picker.title: Select times
picker.helper: Tap the start slot and then the end slot. Invalid values will not be shown.

form.internalNoteHint: This note stays private and is not shown to patients.

list.heading: Current exceptions
list.note: Each day is grouped clearly with the right action.

validation.slotRequired: Choose a start and end slot for the range.
validation.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
validation.datesRequired: Date, start time, and end time are required.

steps.step1Hint: Pick the day you want to adjust.
steps.step3Hint: Check what is already saved for this date.

exceptions.actionHint: Only one action opens at a time, so the form stays compact and easy to scan.

dateSummary.noWeeklySchedule: Does not follow the weekly schedule
dateSummary.note: This adjustment applies only to this date and does not change your recurring weekly schedule.
dateSummary.dayBlocked: Bookings are prevented for this day

currentExceptions.heading: Current exceptions
currentExceptions.subtitle: All current and upcoming schedule changes you added, whether booking blocks or extra availability, appear here.

meta.title: Application — Practitioner
meta.description: Review your readiness and submit your practitioner application.

page.title: Application
page.subtitle: Review your readiness and track your application status.

statusMessage.SUBMITTED: Your application has been submitted and is awaiting review.
statusMessage.UNDER_REVIEW: Your application is being reviewed by the Sawiyaa team. You will be notified of any updates.
statusMessage.APPROVED: Your application has been approved. You are now an active practitioner on Sawiyaa.
statusMessage.REJECTED: Your application was rejected. Please review the note and resubmit if allowed.
statusMessage.CHANGES_REQUESTED: The admin team requested changes before approval. Please review the note and update the form.
statusMessage.ARCHIVED: This application has been archived and is no longer active.

submit.label: Submit application
submit.confirmHint: Once submitted, your application will be reviewed by the Sawiyaa team.

feedback.loadError: Could not load application status. Please try again.
feedback.submitSuccess: Your application has been submitted successfully.
feedback.submitError: Could not submit application. Please try again.
feedback.loadErrorNote: The application summary could not be loaded right now.
feedback.saveError: Could not save changes right now. Please try again.

wizard.title: Complete your application
wizard.subtitle: Complete your information step by step. You can save and return later before submitting.
wizard.reviewBody: This summary shows the profile, credentials, pricing, and payout details the admin will check before making a decision.
wizard.blockedBody: Complete the blockers above before submitting.
wizard.readyBody: You can submit now. The team will review the completed application.
wizard.noCompletionData: Not enough data to calculate completion.
wizard.submitBlocked: Complete the required information before submitting.
wizard.basicAvatarHint: Choose a photo from your device. It will be used as your profile photo once the application is approved.

threeStep.languagesModalDescription: Choose the languages you can work in. The wizard stays compact while you edit them.

helpers.basic: Keep your identity details accurate so the review team can recognize your account easily.
helpers.professional: Describe your practice briefly, then open the focused editors for languages, specialties, and credentials.
helpers.paymentSubmit: Set the prices and payout details you want reviewed, then check the final readiness summary before submitting.

wizard.howItWorksBody: Work through the steps in order, save your progress, and return later whenever you need to.

guide.step2: Add your professional information and specialties.
guide.step3: Enter the session prices you want reviewed.
guide.step5: Check which documents are attached and approved.
guide.step6: Add the payout details we should use after approval.
guide.step7: Review blockers, warnings, and submit when ready.

languages.label: Languages
languages.hint: Choose the languages you can work in.

stepNotes.basicProfile: Start with the core identity and account details that make your profile recognizable.
stepNotes.professionalDetails: Add the fields that help patients understand your expertise and focus areas.
stepNotes.pricing: Set the session prices that will be reviewed before patients see you.
stepNotes.qualifications: Use this step to manage credentials and professional proof.
stepNotes.documents: Review the documents attached through your uploaded credentials.
stepNotes.payoutDetails: Provide the details we will use to transfer your earnings after approval.
stepNotes.reviewSubmit: Check the complete application summary before you submit it.

stepGuidance.basicProfile: Keep these details accurate so the review team can identify you easily.
stepGuidance.professionalDetails: These fields describe your services, specialties, and language coverage.
stepGuidance.pricing: Pricing is reviewed by the admin team before you become visible to patients.
stepGuidance.qualifications: Add or review qualifications that support your professional profile.
stepGuidance.documents: Documents are reviewed through the credentials you upload.
stepGuidance.payoutDetails: This information is used only for earnings transfer after approval.
stepGuidance.reviewSubmit: Make sure every blocker is cleared before you submit.

helpBody.basicProfile: This step gives the review team a clear identity and contact profile before they inspect the rest of your application.
helpBody.professionalDetails: Use the next fields to describe your practice in a simple way that is easy for patients and admins to review.

wizard.specialtiesHint: Manage specialties without leaving the wizard.
wizard.specialtiesSummaryHint: Open the editor in a focused dialog so the wizard stays compact.
wizard.specialtiesModalDescription: Update the specialties tied to your practitioner profile.
wizard.pricingNote: Enter the prices you want reviewed. The values remain editable until the application is locked.
wizard.qualificationsNoteBody: Open the qualifications editor in a focused dialog to keep this step compact.
wizard.qualificationsSummaryHint: Credentials are managed in a separate dialog so the wizard remains focused.
wizard.qualificationsModalDescription: Add or review the credentials that support your application.
wizard.documentsNote: {count, plural, one {# credential is attached.} other {# credentials are attached.}}
wizard.documentsHint: If a document step is empty, upload the missing credential first.
wizard.documentsIssuesHint: Any document-related issues will appear here in a compact summary.
wizard.payoutNote: Choose the payout method and complete only the fields that match that method.

issueGroups.blockersHint: Resolve the blockers for this step before you submit.

wizard.stepIssuesBody: These are the blockers, warnings, or info items that apply to the step you are viewing.
wizard.footerStepHint: Save your progress and move to the next step when you are ready.
wizard.footerReviewHint: Check the summary one last time before you submit.

generic.title: Missing requirement
generic.description: One or more required items are missing for this step.
generic.whyItMatters: These items are required before the application can be submitted for review.
generic.recommendedAction: Complete the missing fields or uploads, then save the step again.

BASIC_PROFILE_DISPLAY_NAME_MISSING.title: Display name is missing
BASIC_PROFILE_DISPLAY_NAME_MISSING.description: Add the display name shown to patients and the admin team.
BASIC_PROFILE_DISPLAY_NAME_MISSING.whyItMatters: The reviewer needs your name to identify your profile and documents.
BASIC_PROFILE_DISPLAY_NAME_MISSING.recommendedAction: Enter your display name in Basic Info, then save.

BASIC_PROFILE_COUNTRY_MISSING.title: Country is missing
BASIC_PROFILE_COUNTRY_MISSING.description: Select your country so the system can localize your profile and options.
BASIC_PROFILE_COUNTRY_MISSING.whyItMatters: Country is required for profile completeness and review routing.
BASIC_PROFILE_COUNTRY_MISSING.recommendedAction: Choose a country in Basic Info, then save.

PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_TITLE_MISSING.title: Professional title is missing
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_TITLE_MISSING.description: Choose your professional title from the catalog.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_TITLE_MISSING.whyItMatters: The title helps reviewers and patients understand your role and listing.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_TITLE_MISSING.recommendedAction: Select a professional title in Professional Profile, then save.

PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_BIO_MISSING.title: Bio is missing
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_BIO_MISSING.description: Write a short professional bio describing your experience and focus.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_BIO_MISSING.whyItMatters: The team reviews your bio as part of profile verification.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_BIO_MISSING.recommendedAction: Fill the bio field, then save.

PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_YEARS_MISSING.title: Years of experience is missing
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_YEARS_MISSING.description: Enter how many years of experience you have.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_YEARS_MISSING.whyItMatters: This is required for review and eligibility checks.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_YEARS_MISSING.recommendedAction: Enter your years of experience, then save.

PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_LANGUAGE_MISSING.title: Languages are missing
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_LANGUAGE_MISSING.description: Choose at least one language you can provide sessions in.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_LANGUAGE_MISSING.whyItMatters: Language is required to match patients and review the profile.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_LANGUAGE_MISSING.recommendedAction: Select one or more languages, then save.

PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_SPECIALTY_MISSING.title: Specialties are missing
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_SPECIALTY_MISSING.description: Choose at least one specialty you provide.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_SPECIALTY_MISSING.whyItMatters: Specialties are required for review and discovery.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_SPECIALTY_MISSING.recommendedAction: Select a main category and sub-specialties, then save.

PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_PRIMARY_CATEGORY_MI.title: Main specialty category is missing
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_PRIMARY_CATEGORY_MI.description: Choose the main specialty category that best fits your practice.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_PRIMARY_CATEGORY_MI.whyItMatters: The main category is required to structure your specialties and review.
PROFESSIONAL_DETAILS_PRIMARY_CATEGORY_MI.recommendedAction: Select a main category, then save.

QUALIFICATIONS_CREDENTIAL_REQUIRED.title: Qualifications are missing
QUALIFICATIONS_CREDENTIAL_REQUIRED.description: Upload at least one qualification document such as a degree or license.
QUALIFICATIONS_CREDENTIAL_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: The admin team needs evidence of qualifications before approval.
QUALIFICATIONS_CREDENTIAL_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Upload a qualification document in Documents, then save.

QUALIFICATIONS_ACADEMIC_CERTIFICATE_REQU.title: Academic certificate is missing
QUALIFICATIONS_ACADEMIC_CERTIFICATE_REQU.description: Upload an academic certificate (degree) before submitting your application.
QUALIFICATIONS_ACADEMIC_CERTIFICATE_REQU.whyItMatters: An academic certificate is required as evidence of qualification for review.
QUALIFICATIONS_ACADEMIC_CERTIFICATE_REQU.recommendedAction: Upload your academic certificate (degree) in Qualifications/Documents, then save.

DOCUMENTS_CREDENTIAL_REQUIRED.title: Documents are missing
DOCUMENTS_CREDENTIAL_REQUIRED.description: Upload the required documents for review.
DOCUMENTS_CREDENTIAL_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: Documents are required before submitting the application.
DOCUMENTS_CREDENTIAL_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Upload the required documents, then save.

DOCUMENTS_CREDENTIAL_NOT_APPROVED.title: Documents are pending review
DOCUMENTS_CREDENTIAL_NOT_APPROVED.description: Some uploaded documents are still pending admin review.
DOCUMENTS_CREDENTIAL_NOT_APPROVED.whyItMatters: Approval may require manual verification of uploaded documents.
DOCUMENTS_CREDENTIAL_NOT_APPROVED.recommendedAction: Wait for admin review or upload clearer documents if requested.

DOCUMENTS_IDENTITY_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.title: Identity document is required
DOCUMENTS_IDENTITY_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.description: Upload either a passport, or both sides of the national ID.
DOCUMENTS_IDENTITY_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: Identity evidence is mandatory before submission.
DOCUMENTS_IDENTITY_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Upload passport or national ID front and back, then save.

DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_FRONT_MISSING.title: National ID front is missing
DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_FRONT_MISSING.description: Upload the front side of your national ID.
DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_FRONT_MISSING.whyItMatters: Both sides of the national ID are required unless a passport is provided.
DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_FRONT_MISSING.recommendedAction: Upload the national ID front image/file, then save.

DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_BACK_MISSING.title: National ID back is missing
DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_BACK_MISSING.description: Upload the back side of your national ID.
DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_BACK_MISSING.whyItMatters: Both sides of the national ID are required unless a passport is provided.
DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_BACK_MISSING.recommendedAction: Upload the national ID back image/file, then save.

PAYOUT_DESTINATION_REQUIRED.title: Payout method is missing
PAYOUT_DESTINATION_REQUIRED.description: Choose how you want to receive payouts after approval.
PAYOUT_DESTINATION_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: Payout details are required to complete the application.
PAYOUT_DESTINATION_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Select a payout method, then save.

PAYOUT_ACCOUNT_HOLDER_REQUIRED.title: Account holder name is missing
PAYOUT_ACCOUNT_HOLDER_REQUIRED.description: Enter the account holder name for payouts.
PAYOUT_ACCOUNT_HOLDER_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: The admin team checks payout identity consistency.
PAYOUT_ACCOUNT_HOLDER_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Fill the account holder name, then save.

PAYOUT_BANK_NAME_REQUIRED.title: Bank name is missing
PAYOUT_BANK_NAME_REQUIRED.description: Choose the bank name from the list.
PAYOUT_BANK_NAME_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: A valid bank selection is required for payouts.
PAYOUT_BANK_NAME_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Select the bank name, then save.

PAYOUT_BANK_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED.title: Bank account number is missing
PAYOUT_BANK_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED.description: Enter the bank account number for payouts.
PAYOUT_BANK_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: This is required to route payouts correctly.
PAYOUT_BANK_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Enter the account number, then save.

PAYOUT_IBAN_REQUIRED.title: IBAN is missing
PAYOUT_IBAN_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: IBAN is required for IBAN payout method.

PAYOUT_WALLET_PROVIDER_REQUIRED.title: Wallet provider is missing
PAYOUT_WALLET_PROVIDER_REQUIRED.description: Choose the wallet provider from the list.
PAYOUT_WALLET_PROVIDER_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: A valid provider selection is required for wallet payouts.
PAYOUT_WALLET_PROVIDER_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Select a wallet provider, then save.

PAYOUT_WALLET_IDENTIFIER_REQUIRED.title: Wallet number is missing
PAYOUT_WALLET_IDENTIFIER_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: This is required to receive wallet payouts.
PAYOUT_WALLET_IDENTIFIER_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Enter the wallet number, then save.

PAYOUT_OTHER_DETAILS_REQUIRED.title: Payout details are missing
PAYOUT_OTHER_DETAILS_REQUIRED.description: Add the required payout details for the selected method.
PAYOUT_OTHER_DETAILS_REQUIRED.whyItMatters: Payout details must be complete before submission.
PAYOUT_OTHER_DETAILS_REQUIRED.recommendedAction: Complete the payout details fields, then save.

ACCOUNT_INACTIVE.title: Account is inactive
ACCOUNT_INACTIVE.description: Your account is currently inactive and cannot submit the application.
ACCOUNT_INACTIVE.whyItMatters: Only active accounts can submit applications for review.
ACCOUNT_INACTIVE.recommendedAction: Contact support/admin to activate your account.

PRACTITIONER_OTP_NOT_VERIFIED.title: OTP verification is missing
PRACTITIONER_OTP_NOT_VERIFIED.description: Your practitioner account OTP verification is not completed.
PRACTITIONER_OTP_NOT_VERIFIED.whyItMatters: OTP verification is required before submitting.
PRACTITIONER_OTP_NOT_VERIFIED.recommendedAction: Complete OTP verification, then return to submit.

generic.title: Financial reconciliation issue
generic.description: A finance record in this application needs review.
generic.whyItMatters: Missing or mismatched accounting data can affect approvals, payouts, or reporting accuracy.
generic.recommendedAction: Review the linked record and follow the approved finance process if an update is needed.

MISSING_JOURNAL_ENTRY.title: Missing journal entry
MISSING_JOURNAL_ENTRY.description: A related accounting journal entry could not be found.
MISSING_JOURNAL_ENTRY.whyItMatters: Without the journal record, the financial event may not be fully auditable.
MISSING_JOURNAL_ENTRY.recommendedAction: Check the related payment or settlement and confirm the accounting posting was created.

MISSING_GATEWAY_FEE_SNAPSHOT.title: Missing gateway fee snapshot
MISSING_GATEWAY_FEE_SNAPSHOT.description: The payment record is missing the gateway fee snapshot.
MISSING_GATEWAY_FEE_SNAPSHOT.whyItMatters: Fee snapshots help verify the true collected amount and downstream accounting calculations.
MISSING_GATEWAY_FEE_SNAPSHOT.recommendedAction: Review the payment record and confirm the gateway fee was stored correctly.

MISSING_VAT_SNAPSHOT.title: Missing VAT snapshot
MISSING_VAT_SNAPSHOT.description: The payment record is missing the VAT snapshot.
MISSING_VAT_SNAPSHOT.whyItMatters: Missing tax snapshots can make reporting and revenue reconciliation incomplete.
MISSING_VAT_SNAPSHOT.recommendedAction: Review the related payment and confirm the VAT snapshot is stored.

PAYMENT_COUPON_REDEMPTION_MISSING.title: Coupon redemption missing
PAYMENT_COUPON_REDEMPTION_MISSING.description: The payment shows a coupon discount but no redemption record was found.
PAYMENT_COUPON_REDEMPTION_MISSING.whyItMatters: Coupon redemptions keep discounts and settlement sharing traceable.
PAYMENT_COUPON_REDEMPTION_MISSING.recommendedAction: Review the payment and coupon redemption records together.

PACKAGE_SETTLEMENT_COMPLETION_MISMATCH.title: Package settlement completion mismatch
PACKAGE_SETTLEMENT_COMPLETION_MISMATCH.description: The package settlement state does not match the package completion state.
PACKAGE_SETTLEMENT_COMPLETION_MISMATCH.whyItMatters: Package fulfillment should stay aligned with the settlement record before payout actions happen.
PACKAGE_SETTLEMENT_COMPLETION_MISMATCH.recommendedAction: Review the package usage and confirm the completion state is correct.

SETTLEMENT_GROSS_MISMATCH.title: Settlement gross mismatch
SETTLEMENT_GROSS_MISMATCH.description: The settlement gross amount does not match the expected source amount.
SETTLEMENT_GROSS_MISMATCH.whyItMatters: Gross mismatches can affect the total amount sent to payout reconciliation.
SETTLEMENT_GROSS_MISMATCH.recommendedAction: Review the settlement batch and compare it to the source ledger entries.

SETTLEMENT_NET_MISMATCH.title: Settlement net mismatch
SETTLEMENT_NET_MISMATCH.description: The settlement net amount does not match the expected amount after adjustments.
SETTLEMENT_NET_MISMATCH.whyItMatters: Net mismatches can lead to the wrong practitioner payout.
SETTLEMENT_NET_MISMATCH.recommendedAction: Confirm the adjustment logic and the payout calculation source.

SETTLEMENT_PAYOUT_LEDGER_MISMATCH.title: Payout ledger mismatch
SETTLEMENT_PAYOUT_LEDGER_MISMATCH.description: The payout record does not line up with the ledger entry.
SETTLEMENT_PAYOUT_LEDGER_MISMATCH.whyItMatters: Payouts must stay in sync with ledger postings to avoid accounting drift.
SETTLEMENT_PAYOUT_LEDGER_MISMATCH.recommendedAction: Review the payout record and the linked ledger entries before any further action.

WALLET_LEDGER_DRIFT.title: Wallet ledger drift
WALLET_LEDGER_DRIFT.description: The wallet balance differs from the derived ledger value.
WALLET_LEDGER_DRIFT.whyItMatters: Wallets are projections, so any drift should be reviewed before using the balance operationally.
WALLET_LEDGER_DRIFT.recommendedAction: Check the latest ledger entries and the wallet refresh process.

JOURNAL_NOT_BALANCED.title: Unbalanced journal
JOURNAL_NOT_BALANCED.description: The accounting journal does not balance.
JOURNAL_NOT_BALANCED.whyItMatters: An unbalanced journal is a critical accounting issue that can affect every downstream report.
JOURNAL_NOT_BALANCED.recommendedAction: Review the journal posting source before approving anything tied to this record.

DUPLICATE_LEDGER_POSTING.title: Duplicate ledger posting
DUPLICATE_LEDGER_POSTING.description: The same ledger event appears to have been posted more than once.
DUPLICATE_LEDGER_POSTING.whyItMatters: Duplicate postings can inflate balances or payouts if they are not reviewed.
DUPLICATE_LEDGER_POSTING.recommendedAction: Review the affected payment or refund flow and confirm idempotency.

REFUND_REVERSAL_MISSING.title: Refund reversal missing
REFUND_REVERSAL_MISSING.description: A successful refund does not have the expected reversal entries.
REFUND_REVERSAL_MISSING.whyItMatters: Refunds need matching reversals so payouts and reporting stay accurate.
REFUND_REVERSAL_MISSING.recommendedAction: Check the refund flow and confirm the reversal ledger entries were created.

CROSS_CURRENCY_AGGREGATION_RISK.title: Cross-currency aggregation risk
CROSS_CURRENCY_AGGREGATION_RISK.description: This record may be mixing values from different currencies.
CROSS_CURRENCY_AGGREGATION_RISK.whyItMatters: Mixed-currency totals can produce incorrect payouts, balances, or settlement sums.
CROSS_CURRENCY_AGGREGATION_RISK.recommendedAction: Review each currency separately and do not combine them into one total.

professionalDetails.yearsMustBePositive: Years of experience must be greater than zero.
professionalDetails.languageRequired: At least one language is required.
professionalDetails.specialtyRequired: At least one specialty is required.

pricing.session30EgpRecommended: Add a 30-minute price in EGP if this currency is relevant to your profile.
pricing.session30UsdRecommended: Add a 30-minute price in USD if this currency is relevant to your profile.
pricing.session60EgpRecommended: Add a 60-minute price in EGP if this currency is relevant to your profile.
pricing.session60UsdRecommended: Add a 60-minute price in USD if this currency is relevant to your profile.

qualifications.credentialRequired: At least one credential is required.

documents.credentialRequired: At least one credential document is required.
documents.credentialApprovalRequired: At least one credential must be approved before approval.

reviewSubmit.otpNotVerified: The practitioner account has not completed OTP verification.
reviewSubmit.applicationLocked: This application is locked because it is already under review or approved.

application.title: Application
application.description: Check your application status and submit when ready.

page.title: Application
page.subtitle: Review your readiness and track your application status.

submit.label: Submit application
submit.confirmHint: Once submitted, your application will be reviewed by the Sawiyaa team.

feedback.loadError: Could not load application status. Please try again.
feedback.submitSuccess: Your application has been submitted successfully.
feedback.submitError: Could not submit application. Please try again.
feedback.loadErrorNote: The application summary could not be loaded right now.
feedback.saveError: Could not save changes right now. Please try again.

pending.title: Your application is under review
pending.subtitle: We have received your application and the Sawiyaa team is reviewing it now. We will notify you of any updates.
pending.reviewProcess: We are reviewing your professional details and documents to ensure your profile is ready before activating your practitioner account.
pending.infoCallout: You will receive any updates or revision requests via notifications or email.

meta.title: Application — Practitioner
meta.description: Complete your practitioner application on the Sawiyaa platform.

statusMessage.SUBMITTED: Your application has been submitted and is currently under review.
statusMessage.UNDER_REVIEW: Your application is currently under review by the Sawiyaa team. You will be notified of any updates.
statusMessage.APPROVED: Your application has been successfully approved and your practitioner account is now active.

wizard.title: Complete your application
wizard.qualificationsModalDescription: Add or review the documents that support your application.
wizard.stepIssuesBody: These are the blockers, warnings, or info items that apply to the step you are viewing.
wizard.footerStepHint: Save your progress and move to the next step when you are ready.
wizard.footerReviewHint: Check the summary one last time before you submit.
wizard.submitBlocked: Complete the blockers above before submitting.
wizard.readyBody: You can submit now. The team will review the completed application.
wizard.reviewBody: This summary shows the profile, credentials, pricing, and payout details the admin will check before making a decision.

threeStep.languagesModalDescription: Choose the languages you can work in. The wizard stays compact while you edit them.

helpers.basic: Keep your identity details accurate so the review team can easily verify your account.
helpers.professional: Describe your practice briefly, then open the focused editors for languages, specialties, and credentials.
helpers.qualifications: Add or review the credentials that support your professional profile.
helpers.documents: Review the documents attached through your uploaded credentials.
helpers.paymentSubmit: Make sure to complete payout details to submit your application for review.

DOCUMENTS_NATIONAL_ID_FRONT_MISSING.title: Front side of National ID missing
